context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct Python SDK import, correct API method, loop parameter for seamless looping, proper duration and prompt_influence ranges, chunk-based stream writing, and descriptive prompts for ambient sounds.

checklist.name: Correct Python import
checklist.description: Imports ElevenLabs from elevenlabs.client (i.e., 'from elevenlabs.client import ElevenLabs')

checklist.name: Correct API method
checklist.description: Uses client.text_to_sound_effects.convert() (snake_case) to generate sound effects

checklist.name: Loop parameter used
checklist.description: Passes loop=True in the convert() call for the ambient/looping soundscapes

checklist.name: Duration parameter used
checklist.description: Passes duration_seconds parameter in the convert() call with values between 0.5 and 30

checklist.name: Prompt influence parameter
checklist.description: Passes prompt_influence parameter in the convert() call with values between 0 and 1

checklist.name: Chunk-based writing
checklist.description: Writes the audio response by iterating over chunks (e.g., 'for chunk in audio: f.write(chunk)') rather than writing all at once

checklist.name: Binary write mode
checklist.description: Opens output file in binary write mode ('wb')

checklist.name: Environment variable auth
checklist.description: ElevenLabs client is instantiated without hardcoding an API key -- relies on ELEVENLABS_API_KEY environment variable

checklist.name: Descriptive prompts
checklist.description: Soundscape prompts are specific and evocative (more than 2 words each, describing setting/mood/detail, not just single-word labels like 'rain')

checklist.name: At least 4 soundscapes
checklist.description: Configuration defines at least 4 distinct soundscapes to generate

checklist.name: Valid duration range
checklist.description: All specified durations are between 0.5 and 30 seconds
